data.title: Three individuals have been arrested in France for breaking into the home of a Binance executive.
data.description: Three individuals were apprehended by French authorities in connection to a burglary aimed at a top official of Binance in France, as per RTL. Binance has verified that one of its employees was the victim of a house intrusion.

data.title: TCL introduces innovations to enhance Olympics experience - Milano Cortina 2026. Global impact with millions benefiting.
data.description: In Milan on February 13, 2026, technology is being utilized to improve athlete comfort and connectivity during the ongoing Olympic Winter Games. Global Olympic Partner TCL is significantly contributing to enhancing the experience for millions of viewers worldwide during Milano Cortina 2026.

data.title: Core CPI inflation rate drops to near 5-year low, lowest since early 2021. S&P 500 futures remain firm.
data.description: The latest data shows a notable decrease in the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate, marking its lowest point since the beginning of 2021. This decrease has brought the CPI inflation rate to a nearly five-year low. In response to this news, S&P 500 futures have remained steady and firm.

data.title: RH-ISAC names keynote speakers for 2026 Cybersecurity Summit in Austin, including reps from Target and Walmart.
data.description: The upcoming April event in Austin will feature keynote speakers from major retailers Target and Walmart, as well as prominent figures in the industry. The Retail & Hospitality Information Sharing and Analysis Center (RH-ISAC) based in Vienna, Virginia revealed the lineup for their annual event set for Feb. 13, 2026. The event will showcase leaders from these influential companies discussing key insights and strategies.

data.title: Eventide Communications names Interaction Insight Corporation top reseller for 6th year in a row. Highest sales in 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 13, 2026, Eventide Communications revealed that Interaction Insight Corporation (IIC) has secured the top position as its main reseller for the sixth year running. This achievement follows a successful year in 2025 where Interaction Insight showcased the highest sales figures yet again, demonstrating outstanding performance in delivering its services.

data.title: nugs offers welcome offer, simplified plans, expands platform access to Android TV, Google TV, Amazon Fire TV.
data.description: Today, nugs, a top platform for live music streaming, revealed enhancements to its subscription services aimed at simplifying the process and broadening viewing choices on Android TV devices, Google TV, and Amazon Fire TV. This news was shared from San Francisco on February 13, 2026.

data.title: The Coordinating Center appointed as statewide case management provider for Maryland's Medical Day Care Services Waiver.
data.description: In Millersville, Maryland on February 13, 2026, The Coordinating Center, a top provider of person-centered care coordination statewide, has been selected as a case management provider for the Medical Day Care Services Waiver Program in Maryland. This program is overseen by the Maryland Department.

data.title: MIAX CEO Thomas P. Gallagher named Chief Executive of the Year by FOW. Leading tech-driven financial markets.
data.description: Miami International Holdings, Inc. (MIAX®) (NYSE: MIAX), based in Princeton, N.J. and Miami, disclosed on February 13, 2026, that their Chairman and CEO, Thomas P. Gallagher, will be stepping down. MIAX® is recognized for its technology-driven approach in developing and managing regulated financial markets spanning various asset classes.

data.title: Conduent partners with Alabama for chip-enabled SNAP cards to combat EBT fraud; enhanced security for beneficiaries.
data.description: Conduent Incorporated (Nasdaq: CNDT) has partnered with the Alabama Department of Human Resources (DHR) to roll out chip-enabled EBT cards aiming to tackle fraud. The new cards, being sent to EBT holders statewide, offer heightened security measures. This collaboration is anticipated to benefit recipients, particularly those enrolled in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program by boosting account security.

data.title: Goodwill report shows over half of Americans affected by job cuts, AI hype falls short in workplace, young workers face challenges.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Goodwill Industries International reveals that over 50% of Americans have been personally affected by job cuts. Despite the hype surrounding artificial intelligence (AI), its implementation in the workplace has not met expectations. Additionally, the youngest workers in America are facing challenges in keeping pace with the demands of the workforce. The research was released from ROCKVILLE, Md., on February 13, 2026, according to a press release from PRNewswire.

data.title: Fresh Thyme Market emphasizes commitment to community health, hunger relief, and affordability in 2026. #Illinois #PRNewswire.
data.description: In Downers Grove, Illinois, Fresh Thyme Market, a Midwest-based grocer promoting healthier living, has announced a reinvigorated commitment for 2026. The company aims to combat hunger, improve nutrition access, and enhance customer shopping experience. This initiative reflects their dedication to fostering healthier communities.

data.title: Three individuals were arrested following a home invasion at a Binance France executive's home. Binance confirmed the incident.
data.description: According to a report by RTL, three individuals were arrested by the French police in connection with a burglary aimed at a senior executive of Binance France. The cryptocurrency exchange, Binance, has verified that an employee was subject to a home invasion incident.
